Python While Loop Practice

Question

Click "New Question" to start

                        
                    

                

            


            

                
                
                
            


            

        


        

            

                
                
            


            

                

                    

                        
▶ Colour Legend

                        

                            
Syntax highlighting colours:

                            

                                
while Control flow

                                
print Built-in functions

                                
and Logical operators

                                
== Operators

                                
"text" Strings

                                
42 Numbers

                                
True Booleans

                                
# comment Comments

                            

                        

                    


                    

                        
▶ While Syntax

                        

                            
Basic while loop:

                            
while condition:
    # body (indented)
    # update variable

                            
Key points:

                            
    
                                
  • Colon (:) after condition
    • 
                                
  • Body must be indented
    • 
                                
  • Condition must eventually become False
    • 
                                
  • Update variable in loop body
    • 
                            

                        

                    


                    

                        
▶ Indentation

                        

                            
Python requires indentation!

                            
x = 0
while x < 5:
    print(x)  # 4 spaces
    x = x + 1  # 4 spaces

                            
Tab key inserts 4 spaces. After `:` press Enter for auto-indent.

                        

                    


                    

                        
▶ Infinite Loops

                        

                            
Avoid infinite loops!

                            
# WRONG - infinite!
while x < 5:
    print(x)

                            
Correct:

                            
# CORRECT
while x < 5:
    print(x)
    x = x + 1  # Update!

                        

                    


                    

                        
▶ While vs For

                        

                            
Use while when:

                            
    
                                
  • Unknown number of iterations
    • 
                                
  • Condition-based (user input, validation)
    • 
                                
  • Manual control needed
    • 
                            

                            
Use for when:

                            
    
                                
  • Known number of iterations
    • 
                                
  • Looping through sequences
    •
